description: Commercial medical suite quote with elevator logistics and mixed room inventory.

input.inventoryText:
Exam rooms: 4 exam tables, 6 file cabinets, 12 medical supply boxes
Reception: reception desk, waiting room sofa, 8 boxes
Server room: server rack, 10 medical supply boxes

adviceExpect: Comm. Packing: Label all boxes by office/room number.
Confirm freight elevator access, move window, and cab dimensions.
Pre-measure oversized equipment, cabinets, and appliance paths.
